text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 
72 
HYPOTH_MID 
LABEL: 
Acquired Hypothyroidism Mid-Year Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Chronic Condition Warehouse (CCW) criteria for 
acquired hypothyroidism on July 1 of the specified reference period. 
SHORT NAME: HYPOTH_MID 
LONG NAME: HYPOTH_MID 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 =
